name: Pega Platform BPM and CRM REST API
what_it_does: Pega Platform business process management, CRM, and AI decisioning REST API for enterprises to orchestrate customer-facing processes, automate case management, integrate AI-powered next-best-action decisioning, and manage customer engagement across channels — enabling automated BPM workflow orchestration, case lifecycle management, omnichannel customer service, and AI-driven decision automation through Pega's low-code enterprise application platform. Enables AI agents to manage case management for business case creation, routing, and lifecycle automation, handle process orchestration for BPM workflow trigger and stage management automation, access decisioning for AI-powered next-best-action and offer management automation, retrieve assignment management for work assignment and SLA management automation, manage data management for Pega data object creation and update automation, handle pulsing for real-time pulse feed and activity stream automation, access reporting for case analytics and operational reporting automation, retrieve channel integration for omnichannel interaction and CTI integration automation, manage agent desktop for agent task and guided workflow automation, and integrate Pega with Salesforce, SAP, and customer data platforms for enterprise CRM automation.
use_cases: Orchestrating complex customer service case workflows for enterprise CRM automation agents
Deploying AI-powered next-best-action decisioning for customer engagement automation agents
Managing regulatory compliance and audit case workflows for financial services automation agents
Integrating omnichannel customer interactions and routing for contact center automation agents
not_for: Simple CRM without complex process orchestration (Pega is heavyweight BPM+CRM; Salesforce or HubSpot serve simpler CRM needs)
Startups and SMBs (Pega is enterprise-grade, complex and expensive for small organizations)
Pure analytics without operational context (Pega is operational AI and BPM, not analytics platform)
best_when: A large financial institution, insurance company, telecommunications firm, or government agency wanting AI agents to automate complex BPM workflows, case management, and AI-driven next-best-action decisioning through Pega Platform's enterprise process and CRM platform.
avoid_when: PEGA IS DEVELOPER-INTENSIVE: Pega applications require Pega-trained developers (Pega Certified System Architect); automated self-serve assumption creates application_not_built for API operations without Pega-built applications; automated must invest in Pega application development. ENTERPRISE LICENSE REQUIRED: Pega is enterprise software; automated open-developer assumption creates license_required; Pega Platform requires enterprise agreement; automated must have Pega subscription. CASE TYPES ARE APPLICATION-SPECIFIC: Pega case types are defined in Pega application layer; automated generic-case assumption creates case_type_not_found for case operations using case types not defined in deployed Pega application; automated must use case types from the specific Pega application. PEGA CLOUD VS ON-PREMISES DIFFER: Pega Cloud and on-premises deployments have different API endpoints and capabilities; automated uniform-access assumption creates endpoint_mismatch for cloud API calls to on-premises Pega instances; automated must configure correct Pega deployment endpoint.

auth.notes: Pega Platform uses OAuth2 for BPM and CRM REST API. REST API with JSON. Cambridge, MA HQ. Founded 1983 by Alan Trefler. NASDAQ:PEGA ($700M revenue, 2023). Products: Pega Platform (BPM/low-code), Pega Customer Decision Hub (AI decisioning), Pega Customer Service, Pega Sales Automation, Pega CLM (Customer Lifecycle Management). 3,000+ enterprise clients. Industries: financial services, healthcare, insurance, telecom, government. Competes with Salesforce, ServiceNow, and Appian for enterprise CRM and BPM.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Pega Community Edition: free, development sandbox only; Production requires Pega enterprise agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per user; Pega Cloud or self-managed; enterprise custom pricing; user + case volume based
pricing.notes: Cambridge MA. NASDAQ:PEGA. $700M revenue. 3,000+ enterprise clients. Community Edition free. Enterprise CRM/BPM leader.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; BPM and decisioning APIs throttled per Pega deployment capacity

known_agent_gotchas: CASE TYPE IS REQUIRED: Pega API operations require specifying the case type; automated generic-case assumption creates invalid_case_type for operations using case IDs without correct case type context; automated must include case type in all case operations

PROPERTY NAMES ARE PEGA-FORMATTED: Pega property names follow .pyPropName convention with Pega's naming rules; automated standard-json assumption creates property_not_found for property access not following Pega property naming conventions; automated must use Pega-formatted property names

WORK QUEUE ROUTING IS RULE-BASED: Case routing to operators and workqueues is governed by Pega routing rules; automated direct-assign assumption creates routing_conflict for manual assignments overriding Pega's configured routing rules; automated must respect routing rule configurations

DECISIONING REQUIRES STRATEGY SETUP: Pega CDH next-best-action requires configured strategies and propositions; automated out-of-box-decisions assumption creates no_action_recommended for decisioning without pre-configured decision strategies; automated must build decision strategies before calling NBA APIs

VERSIONED RULESETS AFFECT BEHAVIOR: Pega applications use versioned rulesets; automated latest-version assumption creates unexpected_behavior for APIs invoking rules from wrong ruleset version; automated must use correct ruleset version for the target application
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise BPM/CRM. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA, FedRAMP. OAuth2. US/EU/APAC. Customer and business process data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise BPM/CRM. SOC2, GDPR, HIPAA, FedRAMP. OAuth2. US/EU/APAC. Customer and case data.
